name: Blender Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the basil, olive oil, pine nuts, garlic cloves, and salt in the blender or food processor (I use the food processor) and mix at high speed.
2. Stop blending occasionally and scrape the ingredients down toward the bottom with a rubber spatula.
3. When the ingredients are evenly blended, pour into a bowl and beat in the two grated cheeses by hand. This results in a more interesting texture and better flavor than mixing the cheese in the blender.
4. Beat in the softened butter (to room temperature).
5. Before serving over pasta, add a tablespoon or so of hot water in which the pasta has been cooked.
